content:
**V2.5.1 花田碎梦**

小小的蒲公英花田中央，素白衣着的少女开口询问。
「守密人，你曾经爱过什么人，思念过什么人吗？」
梦里某人的身影，倏然浮现在了你的视野里，随后逐渐扭曲成丑恶的肉块——

眼前熟悉的她.....是谁呢？
请从不同的部位中，分辨出属于她的那部分，并在评论区告诉沙耶吧！
少女将帮你重组起那张脸，让「银芯×200」随着蒲公英的种子落在你的掌心~

🎁 沙耶的到来，让「小小礼物」的有效期再次延长！
✦ 兑换码：致拯救忘却前夜的你
✦ 礼包内容：无垢之芯×100
✦ 有效期至<t:1787500740:f>

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**V2.5.1 Dream Fragments in Dandelion Field**

In the heart of a tiny dandelion field, a girl dressed in pale white lifts her soft voice to ask.
"Keeper... have you ever loved someone? Have you ever truly missed someone with all your heart?"
With that, a familiar silhouette that frequented your dreams drifts into view—then slowly, quietly... twists itself into a conglomeration of disgusting flesh.

This familiar person... who is she? From the different body parts, can you identify which part belongs to her?
Won't you tell Saya in the comments? She'll gently put that face back together for you, piece by piece... and let "Silver ×200" drift down into your open palms, carried on the wings of dandelion seeds.

🎁 Saya's arrival extends the redemption period of the "Small Gift" once again!
✦ Redemption Code: YouSavedMorimens
✦ Content: Pure Core×100
✦ Valid until <t:1787500740:f>

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**V2.5.1 꽃밭의 꿈조각**

작은 민들레 꽃밭 한가운데에서 순백의 옷을 입은 소녀가 묻습니다.
「수호자, 너는 누군가를 사랑한 적이 있어? 누군가를 그리워한 적이 있어?」
문득 꿈속 당신의 시야에 누군가의 모습이 떠오르더니, 이내 흉측한 살덩이로 뒤틀리기 시작합니다——

눈앞의 익숙한 그녀는...... 누구일까요?
다른 보위들 중에서, 그녀에게 속한 부분을 찾아내 대글로 사야에게 알려주세요!
댓글을 통해 사야에게 알려주세요! 소녀가 그 얼굴을 다시 조립하고, 민들레 씨앗과 함께 「은심 × 200」 이 당신의 손바닥에 내려앉게 해드릴 거예요~

🎁 사야의 도착으로 그 "작은 선물"의 유효기간이 다시 한번 연장되었다.
✦ 교환 코드: YouSavedMorimens
✦ 패키지 내용: 퓨어 코어 × 100
✦ 유효 기간: <t:1787500740:f>

Everything aside from the skeleton of a plot is unnecessary at the end of the day. 

How you choose to flesh out the skeleton is unnecessary, but it's what sets your work apart from others. 

Was it arguably in poor taste to people who find it to be an instant dealbreaker? Yes. Was it effective at making me feel uneasy and put off? Also yes.

At the end of the day, ignore the art you dislike. Enjoy the art you do. Art is a luxury and a way to express. 

Not everyone will enjoy the same art, and I'd rather not deal with art being given strict, heavy guidelines. The CCP is something I've looked at over the years, and when art gets censored by the government? Even stuff that *could potentially* be making a political statement your current government doesn't like gets censored or pulled away from markets. 

At the end of the day, freedom of expression, of speech--a very American value--extends to art and stories. Just ignore what you don't like, that's what I do. 

Anyways I hope you people have a lovely rest of your day. Stay safe

Well, the logic is there.

Fuminori's mind inverted everything he once found beautiful in the world and turned it into the worst gore and viscera he could've never seen until that surgery.

Saya's true appearance is so unimaginably horrible that Fuminori's inverted perception would see her as the most  innocent thing that he  understands in the world.

And what's the most innocent thing in the world?
= Children.



That's my understanding of it at least.

You will need to reach a series bible of the game to get a good idea of the overall plot.

But in short. Fuminori (The MC) was isolated because of his brain condition making the world a hellscape for him.

Saya was isolated in the world because she was seen as a monster in the world.

Then the question arises; what happens when two isolated beings in a world find each other? 
They become dependent.

In the game, Doctor Ogai (the one who found Saya in the mountains)
Decided to keep and study her.

Saya's body already knew her biological imperative was to release spores and take over the world. However she didn't have the right knowledge of the earth's biological composition needed at the time to do so.

Dr. Ogai decided to help Saya by introducing her to many books and the Internet, along with some animal sperm samples.

But in doing so she also learnt about how humans reproduce through romance novels and articles. And that a main contributor for reproduction is romantic love between people.

This edited how she would view the trigger needed to take over the planet. Which then led to her prompting Fuminori to sleep with her so that she can have a good understanding of what love was (like following a plot of a novel in her head),  along with the DNA composition of humans from his sperm cells before eventually releasing the spores that took over the worls
